title: DRW MD-DRW-530: Sonar Dome Integration
text:
Drawing MD-DRW-530 Rev E — Sonar Dome Integration

## Notes

1. All dimensions in millimetres unless stated.
2. Surface finish: Ra 3.2 unless noted.
3. Parts referenced: P-1149, P-1150, P-1151.
4. Drawn by Cass Doyle, checked by Felix Herrera, approved by Dr. Rhea Voss.
